creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
OK, so the latest patches build fine on amd64, but unfortunately they fail on i386:
```
c++ -MMD  -I/usr/local/include -I. -g -Wall -Wshadow -Wsign-compare -Wextra -Wunreachable-code -Wuninitialized -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing   -std=c++17 -c -o dirtiles.o dirtiles.cpp
In file included from main.cpp:48:
In file included from ./pmtiles_file.hpp:4:
./pmtiles/pmtiles.hpp:524:46: error: non-constant-expression cannot be narrowed from type 'uint64_t' (aka 'unsigned long long') to 'std::basic_string<char>::size_type' (aka 'unsigned int') in initializer list [-Wc++11-narrowing]
        std::string dir_s{pmtiles_map + dir_offset, dir_len};
                                                    ^~~~~~~
./pmtiles/pmtiles.hpp:524:46: note: insert an explicit cast to silence this issue
        std::string dir_s{pmtiles_map + dir_offset, dir_len};
                                                    ^~~~~~~
                                                    static_cast<size_type>( )
1 error generated.
```
